steps: are listed as ways to move up your waitlist position, likely tied to the dYdX community allocation mentioned above. Step 6: Refer Other Traders Share your referral link to bring in other traders. Referrals boost your waitlist rank now, and Arcus has said referrers can earn up to 10% of a referred trader’s fees for life once the referral program is fully active. Tips for Maximizing Your Arcus Position Prioritize dYdX History : If you traded, staked, or otherwise participated with dYdX in the past, connecting that v4 address is one of the more concrete waitlist boosts available right now. Combine Perps Volume Across Venues : Waitlist rank counts volume from dYdX v3, Hyperliquid, and Lighter, so existing activity on any of those platforms carries over. Stay Active on Spot : With 0% fees on stock trades, there’s no cost barrier to keeping your account active while perps access rolls out. Frequently Asked Questions Is the Arcus Token Confirmed? Yes. dYdX founder Antonio Juliano confirmed Arcus will launch its own token, separate from DYDX. Allocation size, distribution method, and a launch date have not been announced yet. Do I Need to Trade to Improve My Waitlist Position? Trading isn’t required to join the waitlist, but prior perps volume on dYdX, Hyperliquid, or Lighter and RWA volume through HIP

3, Cash, or TradeXYZ both factor into your rank. Is Arcus Free to Use? Spot trading on tokenized stocks is 0% fee. Perps fees haven’t been published yet since the product is still in closed beta. Conclusion Arcus combines dYdX’s trading infrastructure with Robinhood Crypto’s tokenized stock lineup, giving users a working spot market today and a confirmed token on the way for a perps waitlist that rewards early, verifiable activity. Trading spot stocks, joining the perps waitlist, and linking a dYdX v4 address cost nothing beyond deposited capital and cover the main actions available today. airdrops.about: What is Arcus? Arcus is a decentralized exchange built by the dYdX Labs team in partnership with Robinhood Crypto. It runs on Robinhood Chain and lets users trade more than 95 tokenized stock tokens around the clock with zero fees on spot trades. Beyond spot, Arcus is rolling out perpetual futures covering equities, crypto, commodities, and indices. The platform is self-custodial, and tokenized stocks can be used as collateral for perps. Arcus launched spot trading in beta on July 1, 2026, with perps still in a closed beta and waitlist phase.

airdrops.about: What is Monetrix? Monetrix is a yield-bearing stablecoin protocol built natively on HyperEVM . The protocol issues USDM, a stablecoin pegged 1:1 to USDC, and sUSDM, its auto-compounding staked version. Users mint USDM by depositing USDC and stake it to sUSDM, with yield distributed through exchange rate appreciation rather than rebases. Yield comes from delta-neutral strategies that captures funding rates, HLP returns, maker rebates, and other Hyperliquid-native sources without any centralized exchange custody or off-chain execution. Every position is verifiable on-chain, which is the main differentiator against yield-bearing stablecoins that rely on opaque CEX-based strategies. Monetrix is built by the Hybra team and was audited through a Code4rena contest in April 2026. Funding details have not been publicly disclosed. The protocol is currently in its pre-launch phase, with the Genesis Signal campaign live ahead of the main Genesis opening.

airdrops.about: What is SolPump? SolPump is a premier on-chain Solana betting platform that specializes in crash games and betting opportunities using SOL tokens. The platform operates directly on the Solana blockchain, allowing users to connect their personal wallets and place bets without transferring funds to separate gaming accounts. This approach ensures that users maintain full control over their assets while participating in gaming activities. The platform features a Provably Fair system that uses cryptography and third-party input to generate random values, allowing players to verify game outcomes and ensure legitimate operations. SolPump integrates social features through its active chat community, where players can interact, share strategies, and participate in hourly airdrop distributions.

airdrops.about: What is Brighter? Brighter is a yield engine built on top of Lighter , the zero-knowledge perpetuals exchange on Ethereum. The project is designed to let stablecoin holders and LIT stakers tap into Lighter’s yield share without managing positions manually, under the tagline “Go Brighter, Earn Lighter.” Brighter sits much earlier in its own timeline. No funding round or backer has been publicly disclosed for Brighter itself, and the project is currently in a pre-launch phase built around a points reservation campaign rather than live yield deposits. For now, wallet connections, social follows, and referrals are what earn Brighter Points.

airdrops.about: What is Hypertrade? Hypertrade is a DEX aggregator built specifically for the Hyperliquid ecosystem, designed to help users find the best rates when swapping crypto across both HyperCore and HyperEVM. The platform searches across multiple decentralized exchanges including Hyperliquid Spot, Hyperswap, and Prjx to identify the most favorable swap rates. When executing trades, Hypertrade automatically splits orders across different exchanges if needed to maximize output and minimize slippage. The platform uses Invisium Swap Simulations to simulate complex swap paths before execution, ensuring 100% accurate swap quotes for users.

airdrops.about: What is Liquidiction? Liquidiction is a frontend aggregator for Hyperliquid’s HIP-4 prediction markets. It pulls together binary prediction markets, where users trade on price outcomes and other events, into one interface with live odds, real-time order books, leaderboards, and activity tracking across all active markets. The platform runs on Hyperliquid , a high-performance L1 built for on-chain trading. HIP-4 is Hyperliquid’s native prediction market standard; Liquidiction is the main frontend for discovering and trading those markets. No external funding has been publicly disclosed.

steps: cost little to nothing. Step 3: Trade or Hold Stock Tokens Eligible users outside the US can access Stock Tokens directly in Robinhood Wallet and trade them 24/7. These are tokenized debt instruments tracking US equities and ETFs, not direct share ownership, so check the disclosures before treating them like stock. Step 4: Try Onchain Perpetual Futures Robinhood Chain supports perpetual futures trading through partner venues like Lighter. This is a real

money activity involving leverage, so size positions carefully. There’s a 11 $LIT incentive pool for perps trading through the Robinhood wallet app. Step 5: Explore Other Ecosystem Apps Use Arcus to trade spot tokens and join the Arcus perps waitlist to become eligible for their future token. Also, explore other ecosystem apps here . Tips for Getting Positioned Early Bridge real assets, not dust : If a retroactive airdrop ever materializes, meaningful onchain activity is more likely to matter than a single token swap. Use the chain the way you’d normally use an L2 you plan to stick with. Take advantage of sponsored gas now : The 90

day fee sponsorship window is a limited opportunity to test swaps, bridging, and lending without eating transaction costs. It won’t last. Watch the explorer, not rumors : Track your own activity through the Robinhood Chain explorer rather than relying on third
party trackers claiming to know airdrop criteria that Robinhood hasn’t published.
airdrops.about: What is Robinhood Chain? Robinhood Chain is a permissionless Layer 2 blockchain built on Arbitrum , designed specifically for financial services and tokenized real-world assets. The platform enables native issuance, access, and transfer of tokenized assets without intermediaries, positioning itself as the infrastructure layer for Robinhood’s onchain financial services. With 100ms block times and secured by Ethereum, the chain provides developers with high-throughput infrastructure to build financial applications. The project is backed by Robinhood Markets, which has raised approximately $5.77 billion across multiple funding rounds from notable investors including Sequoia Capital, Andreessen Horowitz (a16z), Ribbit Capital, Index Ventures, and DST Global. Robinhood Chain’s testnet launched on February 11, 2026, with mainnet deployment anticipated in the coming months. The platform has committed $1 million to the 2026 Arbitrum Open House program to support developer activity on its testn

airdrops.about: What Is Hyperliquid? Hyperliquid is a purpose-built Layer 1 blockchain for high-performance DeFi. At its core is the Hyperliquid DEX: a fully on-chain orderbook perpetuals exchange processing roughly 200,000 orders per second with ~0.2s median latency — no off-chain sequencer, zero gas fees. The platform supports perpetual futures, spot trading, and a native token standard with permissionless liquidity provision. The HYPE token powers the entire ecosystem: staking, governance, fee payments, and token burns. The protocol burns HYPE regularly using a portion of generated revenue — a governance vote in early 2026 approved burning approximately $1 billion worth of HYPE, adding deflationary pressure on top of the staking yield. Since its alpha launch in 2023, Hyperliquid has crossed $100 billion in cumulative trading volume and now commands roughly 60% of the total perpetual DEX market.

airdrops.about: What is Theo Network? Theo Network is a cross-chain DeFi protocol that has raised $20M in funding to democratize access to institutional-grade trading infrastructure. The platform aims to unify assets from various protocols and chains, creating a more seamless and efficient liquidity ecosystem. At the core of Theo’s offerings is “Theo Earn,” which features delta-neutral vaults that leverage lending platforms and perpetual futures markets to capture funding rates while minimizing market exposure risks. Theo Network’s approach to DeFi focuses on capital efficiency through stablecoin-based infrastructure. By enabling users to manage assets across different blockchains without the typical complexity, Theo addresses a significant pain point in the current DeFi landscape. The platform’s delta-neutral strategies provide an alternative to traditional high-risk yield farming methods, potentially appealing to users seeking more stable returns in volatile markets.

airdrops.about: What is Collector Crypt? Collector Crypt is a Solana-based platform that turns physical, professionally graded trading cards into redeemable NFTs. Most of its inventory is Pokémon, with One Piece and other categories added over time. Each card sent to the platform is authenticated, stored in an insured vault, and minted as a programmable NFT (pNFT) that maps 1:1 to the real item. The project raised about $1.9 million , with backers including GSR and Big Brain Holdings. The $CARDS token launched in August 2025 and powers Gacha purchases and platform rewards.

airdrops.about: What Is TrueNorth? TrueNorth is an agentic brokerage giving retail traders their own desk of AI trading agents modeled on professional traders. The platform handles research, signals, trade setup, and execution in one place, instead of leaving users to piece together charts, news, and on-chain data themselves. TrueNorth raised $3 million in a pre-seed round in December 2025, led by CyberFund with Delphi Labs, GSR, SNZ, and Ocular VC also participating. airdrops.about: What is Katana? Katana is a blockchain made just for DeFi. Its focused application architecture is meant to provide deeper liquidity and higher yields. Katana doesn’t split liquidity across many protocols. Instead, it channels all activity through one lending protocol (Morpho) and one spot DEX (Sushi), with hundreds of apps building on top of them. This focused approach brings in money from several sources, such as Vault Bridge, sequencer fees, and Agora USD revenue. This money then flows back as rewards across Katana’s main apps. The chain uses Agglayer to make it easy for users to join from other chains and ZK proofs to check state transitions, so users can leave without having to wait long. The KAT token makes the ecosystem work. Users who lock KAT will get vKAT (voting KAT), which is what keeps the chain’s economy going by rewarding people who work together with fees. The vKAT system will go live at the same time as the vKAT Armory staking UI.

airdrops.about: What is Ondo Perps? Ondo Perps is a perpetual futures trading platform built by the team behind Ondo Finance, offering 24/7 trading on tokenized U.S. equities, ETFs, and commodities. Users can take long or short positions on assets like NVDA, TSLA, AAPL, gold, silver, and oil with up to 20x leverage. The platform launched in early access in 2025 and is available to users outside the United States and other restricted jurisdictions. The platform’s main differentiator is planned support for tokenized securities as collateral. Existing RWA perps venues force traders to post stablecoins, locking up capital twice when they already hold the underlying asset. Ondo Finance previously raised a $4M seed round in 2021; a $20M Series A in 2022 led by Founders Fund and Pantera Capital, with backing from Coinbase Ventures, Tiger Global, and Wintermute and $22M in May 2022.

airdrops.about: What is Grass Network? Grass Network is a decentralized web scraping protocol (DePIN) that enables users to monetize their unused internet bandwidth. By connecting users with AI labs and retailers, Grass creates a mutually beneficial ecosystem where participants can earn rewards while contributing to the development of transparent AI models. Having secured $4.5 million in seed funding led by Polychain Capital and Tribe Capital in December 2023, Grass has positioned itself as a key player in democratizing AI development. The project operates on the Solana blockchain, leveraging its speed and scalability while maintaining robust security through zero-knowledge (ZK) technology. airdrops.about: What is Extended? Extended is a decentralized perpetuals exchange built on Starknet, offering 100+ markets spanning crypto, equities, FX, commodities, and indices, with leverage up to 100x. The platform implements a hybrid Central Limit Order Book (CLOB) model that processes orders and matches trades off-chain while settling transactions on-chain through Starknet’s zk-enabled infrastructure. An app-specific chain for decentralized sequencing is currently in development. This architecture enables Extended to deliver high-performance trading with reduced gas fees while maintaining security through Starknet’s infrastructure. Their hybrid approach optimizes for both speed and cost-efficiency, addressing common pain points in DeFi trading. Extended was built by a team with backgrounds at Revolut and has secured $19 million in funding from investors including Cyber Fund, Semantic Ventures, and StarkWare.

It calls itself the first quantum-proof, non-inflationary chain. The project focuses on tokenizing real-world assets, decentralized finance (DeFi), AI applications, and safe data validation. DAC is still in the pre-launch phase, but it has plans for an Inception Testnet and an Interstellar Mainnet.

airdrops.about: What is Rally? Rally is a decentralized, AI-powered marketing protocol built on GenLayer that addresses inefficiencies in influencer marketing. The platform creates a transparent marketplace where projects and content creators connect directly, with AI-verified quality scoring replacing traditional metrics like follower counts and engagement rates. The protocol operates across multiple chains including Base and zkSync , using Intelligent Contracts for automated, onchain settlement. Rally evaluates content based on accuracy, alignment, compliance, originality, reach, and resonance, ensuring that quality and genuine influence are rewarded over vanity metrics. The system converts campaign participation into Rally Points, the protocol’s core currency that represents value across the entire network.

Ongoing Based Bot Airdrop Details Based Bot is currently running a speculative airdrop campaign through a points and leaderboard system. While no official token has been announced, the platform has implemented a comprehensive points farming mechanism that rewards users for various activities including trading volume, referral participation, and platform engagement. The campaign appears to be building toward a potential token distribution based on accumulated points and user activity. The airdrop mechanism operates through multiple earning vectors, with trading activity serving as the primary points generation method. Users can accumulate additional points through the referral program, which offers 30% cashback on fees generated by referred users. The platform also features an influencer and ambassador program designed to reward high

volume referrers with enhanced earning opportunities. Latest Update: BasedBot is live from block zero on Robinhood Chain, with full trading, bridging, transfers, and automation available now on basedbot app and its Telegram bot.
airdrops.about: Based Bot Airdrop Guide: How to Farm Points and Earn Rewards What is Based Bot? Based Bot is a comprehensive Telegram trading bot that operates across multiple major blockchain networks including Base, BSC, Ethereum Mainnet, and Solana. The platform serves as a complete trading solution for DeFi and decentralized exchange operations, offering users the ability to trade various tokens directly through Telegram’s interface. The bot has gained attention for its extensive compatibility with different DEXs and launchpads across supported networks. The platform distinguishes itself through its multi-chain functionality and advanced trading features. Based Bot provides users with high-speed transaction processing, multi-wallet support, and a multi-language interface to accommodate traders from different regions. The bot also includes sophisticated trading tools such as real-time position tracking, automated trading features, and protective measures against common trading risks.

airdrops.about: What is Purinta? Purinta is a memecoin money market that lets people get liquidity out of their meme coin holdings without having to sell them. The protocol lets people use meme coins as collateral to borrow or mint USDC. In simple terms, “Deposit your memes, print USDC.” It is built on Morpho and uses Api3DAO for decentralized price feeds, which gives it a modular, permissionless base. The main use case is for memecoin holders who have a constant problem: getting liquidity without losing exposure. Instead of selling when prices are unstable, users can put up their assets as collateral and borrow against them.

The team still holds a 25% ecosystem reserve for future incentives, and the new Robinhood Wallet rewards pool is currently the most direct way to earn additional LIT.
airdrops.about: What is Lighter? Lighter is a zero-knowledge rollup on Ethereum that is made for high-performance spot and perpetual futures trading. It does all of its order matching and liquidations on-chain, using cryptographic proofs. This means it can match orders as quickly as a CEX while still being as secure as Ethereum. There are no fees for trading in select markets, and traders of all kinds can access the platform through both an API and a UI. The project raised $68M in a Series B round in November 2025 at approximately a $1.5B valuation. Founders Fund and Ribbit Capital were the main investors, along with Haun Ventures and Robinhood. $LIT, Lighter’s native token, came out in December 2025.

steps: Confirm your wallet holds a Jumper Pass of Level 5 or higher
Sweep at least $5 of dust on Base using the Jumper Dust Sweeper
Sign up for Megapot using the same wallet you swept dust with (tickets can take up to 3 days to appear)
airdrops.about: What is Jumper Exchange (LI.FI)? Jumper Exchange is a multi-chain liquidity aggregator that brings together three types of liquidity sources: DEX aggregators, solvers, and cross-chain bridges. It makes trading easier by giving you a full order routing system, which saves you the time and effort of doing research, setting up, and keeping things running. Jumper/LI.FI is the routing and execution layer that connects applications to on-chain liquidity across chains, bridges, DEXs, and solvers through a single integration. It powers Jumper Exchange, a multi-chain platform for bridging and swapping digital assets. Jumper combines liquidity from many decentralized exchanges and bridges to find the best trading paths across several blockchains. Investors like Coinbase Ventures and DragonFly Capital have given LI.FI $52 million in funding.
airdrops.eligibility: All users who earn XP through platform activity Jumper has also integrated with Hyperliquid , allowing users to bridge any token into the Hyperliquid ecosystem
